arts.ttl: “Different class” Arsenal forward denied brilliant assist by teammate’s “really tame effort”
arts.sum: Arsenal will be hoping to pick up all three points against Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby today and they were handed a golden opportunity to take the lead. Belgian winger Leandro Trossard managed to set up teammate Gabriel Martinelli with an exceptional bit of play, but the Brazilian forward failed to convert the […] The post “Different class” Arsenal forward denied brilliant assist by teammate’s “really tame effort” appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Moment Arsenal mascot shoves and taunts Tottenham counterparts ahead of north London derby as Piers Morgan jokes: 'Even our mascots are harder!'
arts.sum: Four Tottenham mascots were approached by an Arsenal counterpart, who gave them a shove and taunted them before he walked away after they tried to high-five Gunners players in the tunnel.

arts.ttl: Robin Van Persie insists he's 'not traumatised' after new Heerenveen boss suffers record 9-1 defeat in Dutch top flight as he admits he's been through it before with Arsenal's 8-2 defeat to Man United
arts.sum: The former Arsenal and Manchester United forward is in his first season as a coach of a top flight club and in his fourth match in charge saw his side suffer their biggest defeat ever at AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: Arsenal Martin Odegaard blow confirmed as Oleksandr Zinchenko absence for Tottenham explained
arts.sum: Martin Odegaard is one of several players absent as Arsenal take on Tottenham Hotspur in the North London Derby. The Gunners captain picked up an ankle injury while on international duty with Norway and was a doubt heading into the game despite Mikel Arteta's pre-match comments suggesting he could be fit.
